name: Blueberry-Cherry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly crush the blueberries, one layer at a time.
2. Stem and pit the sour cherries and finely chop them.
3. Combine the fruits and measure out 3 1/2 cups into a 6- to 8-quart saucepot.
4. Measure the sugar and set aside.
5. Mix the fruit pectin into the fruit in the saucepot.
6. Place over high heat and stir until the mixture comes to a full boil.
7. Immediately add all the sugar and stir.
8. Bring to a full rolling boil and boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
9. Remove from heat and skim off foam with a metal spoon.
10. Ladle quickly into hot jars, filling within 1/8 inch of the tops.
11. Wipe jar rims and threads.
12. Cover with two-piece lids and screw bands tightly.
13. Invert jars for 5 minutes, then turn upright.
14. After 1 hour, check seals.
Or follow the water bath method recommended by USDA.
Makes 5 (1 cup) jars
